channel.title: Web & Software Development Tutorials on GeekLaunch
channel.description: Recent content in Web & Software Development Tutorials on GeekLaunch

item.title: Web & Software Development
item.description: I'm experienced with many technologies and programming languages, including: Front-end HTML/CSS/JavaScript Sass/SCSS TypeScript Angular React Server-side PHP Microsoft SQL MySQL Node.js Applications/misc programming C C++ C# Java Python 3 Rust Solidity (Ethereum blockchain) Assembly Other technologies Linux LaTeX Hugo Git JIRA I use Hugo to maintain this website. Some of my work is on GitHub.
